# Ali Camur Photography

> Fine art landscape and cityscape photography by Ali Camur, sold as limited-edition metal prints (edition of 50, signed and numbered with a certificate of authenticity). Based in King of Prussia, Pennsylvania.

## About the artist

Ali Camur is a fine art photographer born and raised in Istanbul, Turkey, now based in King of Prussia, Pennsylvania. He holds a Bachelor's degree in Fine Art Photography & Film from T.C. Maltepe University (2010) and trained in analog darkroom technique. His work focuses on landscapes, coastlines, and cityscapes captured during golden hour and blue hour, with a cinematic, natural aesthetic — "warmth without exaggeration, drama without noise."

## What is offered

- Limited-edition fine art metal prints, edition of 50 per image
- Printed on premium aluminum (ChromaLuxe) with a high-gloss finish
- Each print is hand-signed, numbered, and ships with a certificate of authenticity
- Available sizes range from 16 inches up to 48 inches on the long edge
- Purchase is by direct inquiry through the website

## Print collection (subjects and locations)

- Bear Lake — Rocky Mountain National Park, Colorado
- Dream Lake — Rocky Mountain National Park, Colorado
- Storm Over the Rockies — Trail Ridge Road, Colorado
- First Light — Assateague Island National Seashore
- Avenue of Oaks — Wormsloe Historic Site, Savannah, Georgia
- Atlanta Golden Hour — Atlanta, Georgia
- Atlanta Blue Hour — Jackson Street Bridge, Atlanta, Georgia
- Lone Tree at Sunset — Valley Forge, Pennsylvania
- Fire and Silence — Miami Beach, Florida
- Moonrise Over the Pier — Virginia Beach, Virginia

- Website: https://www.alicamurphotography.com/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alicamurphotography
- Inquiries: through the contact form on the website
